'''Hodidiji''' was a [[Senator/Legends|New Republic Senator]] during the [[Black Fleet Crisis]].

==Biography==
During the visit of [[Nil Spaar]] to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] in [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]], Hodidiji was convinced by Senators [[Tig Peramis]] and [[Cian Marook]] to support the Yevethan [[Viceroy/Legends|Viceroy]]. When talks with [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] failed and [[Nil Spaar]] fled the planet, Hodidiji yielded his time on the Senator floor to both Peramis and Nil Spaar. The latter used his time to spread lies and misinformation about Organa Solo's intentions, while distracting the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] from the [[Yevethan Purge|xenocidal purge]] occurring in the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]].<ref name="Before the Storm" />
